title: Doff Lightweight Container & Basket Compost – Expands 15L Peat-Free Plant Feed & Garden Fertiliser – Coco Coir Compost Enriched with Fertiliser – Indoor & Outdoor Plants
features: PREMIUM PLANT GROWING MEDIUM – Enhance your garden with Doff Lightweight Container & Basket Compost. The peat free multi purpose coir compost ensures a nutrient-rich growing base for healthier plants. For indoor and outdoor plants

NUTRIENT-ENRICHED FOR VIBRANT GROWTH – Infused with vital nutrients, this compost supports strong plant development while locking in moisture. It holds several times its dry weight in water, ensuring your baskets, pots, and containers stay hydrated and nourished for thriving blooms and greenery

CLEAN & VERSATILE - Perfect for use with fruits, vegetables, flowers, or herbs, this plant compost expands to 15 litres when mixed with water. Equivalent to 2 traditional bags, it's compact and lightweight, making it easy to store and transport for a planting project

RELIABLE & CONSISTENT RESULTS – With excellent structural stability, this high-quality potting soil resists compacting, drains efficiently, and remains stable in both dry and wet conditions. A user-friendly solution for professional and hobby gardeners, it delivers consistent results year-round

ROOTED IN EXCELLENCE – With decades of expert experience, Doff products are your go-to for vibrant, healthy plants. Our quality-crafted solutions are proudly made in the UK, offering premium, nutrient-rich growing mediums to help your garden flourish
